title: mo'recipes
description: A mod adding multiple diffrent recipes, features, and items, even some PvP items
body:
- Recipes for: ALL horse armors
- Recipes for: Lapis armor and tools (and a special piece of equipment)
- Recipe for: saddle
- Recipe for: "milk-logged cookie" (stacks up to 16, basiclly a more advanced milk bucket)
- Potion effects: Lapis poisoning (more advanced poison), Lapis purity (grants partial immunity to lapis poisoning I & II
- Recipe: for Enchanted golden apple
- Added smithing recipes for: upgrading all armor & tools to higher tiers (look at the gallery for more info)
- Brewing Recipe for: XP bottles
- Recipes for: various dusts, and refined items (look at the gallery for more info)
- Recipe for: nametag

Make a issue on the Github to suggest any ideas/recipes https://github.com/PixelThiefy-windows/Mo-recipes

JEI is recomended due to the ammount of current (and future!) recipes
